name: HWR_WEB_POST_DETAILS
description: This table is to be used to store the Web Post Detail objects from the social medila websites in our database.

columns.Name: WEB_POST_DETAILS_ID
columns.Comments: This represents the Id of the web post details used to uniquely identify the record.

columns.Name: WEB_POST_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Web Post Id identifying the web post details object from social media websites in this table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This represents the social media source from which this web post details object was obtained.

columns.Name: SOURCE_POST_ID
columns.Comments: This represents the web post id associated with this post.

columns.Name: SRC_CHILD_POST_ID
columns.Comments: This represents the web post id of the child associated with this post.

columns.Name: TYPE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the type of the web post details object this record is representing.

columns.Name: VALUE
columns.Comments: This column represents the value of the web post details object this record is representing.

columns.Name: POST_CREATED_ON
columns.Comments: This column represents the date when this web post details was created.

columns.Name: POST_UPDATED_ON
columns.Comments: This column represents the date when this web post details was updated.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
